name: Brick Odyssey
short_description: The roguelike block-breaker that the gaming world needed! Choose your hero and destroy bricks to make him fight. Skillfully maneuver the ball, optimize your upgrades wisely, and maybe you will reach the end of this Odyssey!
detailed_description:
A storm approaches on the horizon. Stirred by the dark rituals of a heinous cult, the forces of evil are once again emerging from their lair. Humanity needs a champion to protect it.
Are you ready to embark on the Odyssey that awaits you?



Master your champion together with the powers of your inner field of bricks, only then will you stand a chance against the forces of evil that stand against you.

The gameplay is easy to understand and hard to master, with an innovative take on the classic brick breaking genre, seamlessly combined with roguelike RPG progression creating something unique, challenging and endlessly entertaining.



Brick Odyssey is filled to the brim with various enemies, elites and bosses with their unique set of abilities, as well as relics and brick upgrades to turn the tide of war. Choose wisely and experiment with different builds and playstyles.

Features

  • Classic breakout playstyle with an action roguelike twist
  • Clear the bricks to defeat the hordes of evil
  • Take on the numerous elites of the realm
  • Upgrade your bricks and turn the tide of battle
  • Discover a wide range of relics to synergize and change your gameplay
  • Take on challenges to ease your next playthrough, should you succeed
  • Unlock multiple heroes, each with their own very unique playstyle
  • Explore a great amount of events, and choose the outcome

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Italian
